description: T625 ConsentGateEnforcer MUST check user consent status at ORDER 1 unconditionally — before any ad delivery decision. Missing ORDER 1 check allows unapproved ads to pass through on retry or bypass attempts.
blockConditions: T625 checks consent at execution order > 1
T625 has exception path that skips consent check
Consent validation absent from T625 execution flow
passConditions: T625 calls consentValidator.verify(userId, tenantId) at executionOrder=1
Consent check precedes all ad delivery logic — no bypass paths
Mismatch returns DataProcessResult.failure('CONSENT_REQUIRED') immediately

description: T625 ConsentGateEnforcer MUST read consent_expiry_hours from FREEDOM config. Hardcoded consent validity window prevents operator adjustment for regulatory changes across jurisdictions.
blockConditions: T625 uses hardcoded consent_expiry_hours constant instead of FREEDOM config
T625 does not read consent_expiry_hours from freedom.getConfig()

passConditions: T625 calls freedom.getConfig('consent_expiry_hours') for validity window

description: T625 ConsentGateEnforcer MUST emit ConsentGateFailed on rejection. Upstream systems depend on this event to trigger re-consent workflows. Silent rejection leaves users with no path to approve ads.

userId comparison uses request-provided value instead of ALS
passConditions: T625 resolves userId exclusively from AsyncLocalStorage

description: T626 AuctionBidProcessor MUST acquire SETNX(bid-lock:{auctionId}) at ORDER 1 before any bid record write. Missing lock allows concurrent BidAccepted events to produce duplicate bids for the same auction slot.
